subcodes.first_line: Say: O people! By God, the Torah hath borne witness unto Him unto Whom the stones have testified, and the Gospel crieth unto the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا قوم تالله قد شهدت التورات لمن شهدت له الحصاه و الانجیل ینادی للرب
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
